title: Implement an infrastructure repository
scenario: Infrastructure implements application ports. The application trait stays the dependency boundary.
instructions: Implement InMemoryUserRepository for the UserRepository port.

hints.body: Add an infrastructure module with InMemoryUserRepository storing NewUser values and a next_id counter.
Implement UserRepository by comparing user.email() in exists_by_email and by returning UserId(next_id) from save.
One complete solution for Implement an infrastructure repository is shown below.

completionExplanation: InMemoryUserRepository now implements the application port without changing the application or domain layers.
